text: The entire login portal is throwing a 500 error for every single user in our organization. We can't access any data.
srsly the app is crawling today. it takes like 30 seconds just to load the dashboard. fix it now!!
Would be great if we could get a dark mode option. My eyes are killing me during late night sessions.
I noticed a small typo in the settings menu under the 'Notification' tab. It says 'Notifcation' instead.
The CSV export tool is failing every time I try to download the quarterly report. I have a board meeting in an hour and need this data.
I was double charged for my subscription this month. Please look into this and process a refund.
It would be super cool if we could integrate with Slack to get real-time updates on task completion.
The drag-and-drop interface for the Kanban board is a bit clunky. It doesn't always register where I want to drop the card.
CRASHED AGAIN. Third time today while trying to save a project. I'm losng work every time it happens.
Is there any way to change the font size? The current one is a bit too small for my team to read comfortably on laptops.
The API response times have tripled since the last update. Our internal tools are timing out.
I'm having trouble updating my credit card info. The 'save' button just spins forever.
Great platform! Any plans to add an AI-powered summary for the long comment threads?
The mobile app won't open on iOS 17. It just shows the splash screen and then closes immediately.
I accidentally deleted a project and can't find a way to restore it from the trash. Is it gone forever?
The search filter for 'date created' isn't sorting correctly. It shows entries from 2023 before 2024.
Can you guys add a bulk edit feature for user permissions? Doing it one by one for 50 people is a nightmare.
Security vulnerability: I can see the email addresses of users from other organizations in the global search bar.
The page transitions feel a bit sluggish on Firefox, though they work fine on Chrome.
I need to download all our invoices for the fiscal year end. Where can I find the archive?
The system keeps logging me out every 5 minutes even while I am actively typing. I've lost unsaved work twice today.
URGENT: Payment gateway is down. Customers are unable to checkout and we are losing sales by the minute.
Could we get a public API for the analytics module? We want to build our own custom dashboards.
The sidebar icons are too similar. I keep clicking on 'Settings' when I mean to click 'Profile'.
Intermittent timeouts when saving large files. Happens about 20% of the time.
Does this tool support multi-factor authentication? I couldn't find it in the security settings.
The formatting in the email notifications is completely broken. It looks like raw HTML code.
I'm having a hard time understanding the pricing for the 'Enterprise' tier. Is the seat limit monthly or yearly?
The site is fire! Love the new layout. Maybe add a way to pin favorite projects to the top?
Whenever I try to upload a profile picture, the site just refreshes and nothing happens.
Help! I'm completely locked out of my account because the 2FA code isn't being sent to my phone.
The search function is very slow when we have more than 1000 items in the list. It takes forever to filter.
Could you add a 'Select All' button in the archive? Deleting 200 items individually is tedious.
The app works fine but it consumes way too much RAM on my Mac. My laptop fan is constantly at max speed.
Just wanted to say thanks for the quick support on my last ticket! Everything is working great now.
The color contrast in the new reporting dashboard is very low. It's hard to read the light gray text on the white background.
I tried to upgrade to the Pro plan but the transaction failed with an 'Unknown Error'. My bank says the charge went through.
Is there a way to export the activity log to Excel? We need it for our audit tmw morning.
The 'Delete Project' button is right next to the 'Edit' button and it doesn't have a confirmation prompt. I keep deleting stuff by mistake.
Our custom domain integration is broken. All our links are pointing to 404 pages. This is a critical issue for our brand.
The auto-save feature doesn't seem to work sometimes. I have to manually click save every minute to be safe.
Would love to see a Gantt chart view for the project timeline.
it doesnt work sometimes... like the button click just ignores me. happens on the mobile web view mostly.
Why did my monthly bill increase by $20 without any notification? I didn't change my plan.
The database migration has been stuck at 99% for the last 4 hours. We are unable to use the platform during this time.
Could you integrate with Google Calendar? It would make scheduling meetings so much easier.
The font used in the headers is a bit hard to read. Is it possible to change it back to the old one?
The app keeps freezing whenever I try to upload a file larger than 10MB.
Can we get a way to export our data in JSON format? Currently it only supports CSV and PDF.
EMERGENCY: The main database seems to be corrupted. All project titles have been replaced with random strings.
